root_text.an3.44:1.3: Yo dhammaṁ deseti so atthappaṭisaṁvedī ca hoti dhammappaṭisaṁvedī ca.
root_text.an3.44:1.4: Yo dhammaṁ suṇāti so atthappaṭisaṁvedī ca hoti dhammappaṭisaṁvedī ca.
root_text.an3.44:1.5: Yo ceva dhammaṁ deseti yo ca dhammaṁ suṇāti ubho atthappaṭisaṁvedino ca honti dhammappaṭisaṁvedino ca.
root_text.an3.44:1.6: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhi ṭhānehi kathā pavattinī hotī”ti.

translation_text.an3.44:1.3: When the teacher understands the meaning and the teaching.
translation_text.an3.44:1.4: When the audience understands the meaning and the teaching.
translation_text.an3.44:1.5: When both the teacher and the audience understand the meaning and the teaching.
translation_text.an3.44:1.6: These are the three situations in which conversation flows.”
